ST-LINK SN  : 066BFF514852898767094734
Device name : STM32L47xxx/L48xxx

HardFault Analyzer
------------------
Status: HardFault detected

Faulty PC      : 0x08000B12
NVIC position  : -1
Fault type     : HardFault

Configurable Fault Status Register (CFSR) : 0x00000000

Hard Fault Status Register (HFSR) : 0x80000000
    - DEBUGEVT: Debug event triggered HardFault

System Control Block (SCB):
    MMFAR : 0xE000ED34
    BFAR  : 0xE000ED38
    SHCSR : 0x00000000
